Description:
Ballistics of 115x728R 3UBM3 round, equipped with the 3BM3 Tungsten-Carbide tipped Steel core APFSDS penetrator, fired from the U-5TS tank gun (GRAU index 2A20), chiefly employed on the T-62 tank. 

Barrel length is 5840mm, chamber measures 723mm, projectile travel taken as the difference. Cartridge loads mixed grains of:
- 3.2 kg of 18/1 grains with force of 830,000 kgf-dm/kg, web 1.73mm, perforation diameter 1.88-1.89mm
- 4.734 kg of 12/7 grains with force of 900,000 kgf-dm/kg, web 1.27mm, perforation diameter 0.44mm
Propellant develops 3650 kgf/cm² space-mean pressure, and 1650 m/s muzzle velocity. Alternative charge design exist with 7.85 kg of 14/1 DG-4 according to Russian sources.

The weight-averaged properties of the two propellants is used for modelling. Ballistic represented based on Chinese report on captured T-62 "545". Pressure is interpreted as copper-crusher gauge measurement, requiring a correction factor in range of 1.1-1.2 for conversion to piezoelectric values. Chambrage from 枪炮内弹道学 (2014).
